headline: 1 Energy Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Even if they go mostly unnoticed, energy businesses are the backbone of our country, providing the energy we need to power our lives and businesses.Their momentum is also rising as lower interest rates, as well as AI energy needs, have incentivized higher capital spending. As a result, the industry has posted a 19.5% gain over the past six months, beating the S&P 500 by 11.5 percentage points.
